product_overview: Zakerly is an Arabic-first, RTL SaaS platform that lets teachers create, publish, and track homework via shareable links while students submit without accounts. The web app focuses on a simple teacher workflow (create → publish → review) and a distraction-free student submission experience.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive, fast homework creation experience for teachers (3-step wizard).
Enable students to join and complete homework via a public link without creating accounts.
Deliver immediate grading, results, and student rankings to teachers.
Ensure RTL-first UI and accessibility for Arabic-speaking users.

features.name: Teacher Authentication
features.description: Allow teachers to sign up and log in so they can create and manage homework. Authentication gates dashboard and creation routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field with incorrect credentials -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Submit -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email field only -> Click Submit -> See validation error for missing password

features.name: Homework Creation
features.description: A guided create wizard where an authenticated teacher defines a homework (title, settings), builds questions (Multiple Choice, True/False), then saves as draft or publishes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Enter homework title -> Set optional settings (grade level, time limit, max attempts) -> Click Add Question -> Choose Multiple Choice -> Enter question text -> Add choices -> Mark correct answer -> Click Add Question -> Choose True/False -> Enter question text -> Click Publish -> See homework listed at /dashboard/hw
Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Add questions -> Click Publish without entering title -> See validation error for missing title
Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Click Save as draft -> See confirmation that homework is saved as draft and listed at /dashboard/hw
Navigate to /dashboard/create unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Be redirected back to /dashboard/create

features.name: Teacher Dashboard & Homework Management
features.description: Teachers view all active and draft homeworks, open individual homework to see performance metrics, and manage settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See list of homeworks (active and drafts) -> Click a homework item -> Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> See homework details and performance metrics
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a homework item -> Click to view submission logs -> See list of individual student submissions and scores
Navigate to /dashboard while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /dashboard

features.name: Student Homework Submission
features.description: Students access a public link to answer questions without an account: provide a name, answer questions, and submit. Submissions are auto-graded and routed to a result page.
user_flows: Navigate to /hw/[id] -> Enter student name -> Select answers for questions -> Click submit -> Navigate to /hw/[id]/result -> See score and feedback
Navigate to /hw/[id] -> Leave student name blank -> Select answers for questions -> Click submit -> See validation error indicating name is required
Navigate to /hw/[id] -> Enter student name -> Select answers for questions -> Click submit -> Encounter network error -> See submission failed message with retry option

features.name: Student Result Viewing
features.description: After submission students see immediate, automated grading, detailed feedback, and ranking/position on the result page.
user_flows: Navigate to /hw/[id]/result after submission -> See total score -> See per-question feedback -> See ranking/position
Navigate directly to /hw/[id]/result without submitting -> See message that no submission was found and a prompt to return to /hw/[id] to submit

routes.description: Result page for students after submission

features.name: Teacher Authentication
features.description: Sign up and log in as a teacher
user_interactions: Fill email and password for login
Fill email and password for signup

features.name: Homework Creation
features.description: Create and publish homework with different question types
